A generalization of the concept in biology of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regulation_of_gene_expression regulation of gene expression].

{{#widget:Tweet|id=1019340984167985154}}

{{#widget:Tweet|id=1358465473222856704}}

{{#widget:Tweet|id=1432790187881287680}}

[[Category:Ericisms]]
[[sn:Regulated Expression]][[Category:Biology]]
[[Category:Concepts]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
